title: rubus gymnocarpus
intro: Rubus gymnocarpus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus gymnocarpus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Rubus gymnocarpus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
